Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 177 

VALUES: 0 = Diagnosis codes that are exempt from the POA reporting requirements (same meaning as 
null/missing) 

1 = Unreported/not used — exempt from POA reporting. This code is equivalent to a blank on the UB-
04. 

Y = Diagnosis was present at the time of inpatient admission. CMS will pay the CC/MCC DRG for those 
selected hospital acquired conditions (HACs) that are coded as 'Y' for the
